rules.summary: Unsanitized eval usage may lead to arbitrary code execution.
Direct HTML assignment from untrusted input can cause XSS.
useEffect dependency list is incomplete and can cause stale data bugs.

rules.line_snippet: for (const id of ids) { await api.get('/items/' + id); }

language_snippets.js: for (const id of ids) { await api.get('/items/' + id); }
language_snippets.ts: for (const id of ids) { await api.get('/items/' + id); }
language_snippets.jsx: for (const id of ids) { await api.get('/items/' + id); }
language_snippets.tsx: for (const id of ids) { await api.get('/items/' + id); }
language_snippets.vue: for (const id of ids) { await axios.get('/items/' + id); }
language_snippets.svelte: for (const id of ids) { await fetch('/items/' + id); }

rules.summary: Sequential API calls in loop can cause major latency regressions.

rules.line_snippet: const resource = await fetch('/api/items/' + params.id).then((r) => r.json());

language_snippets.js: const resource = await fetch('/api/items/' + params.id).then((r) => r.json());
language_snippets.ts: const resource = await fetch('/api/items/' + params.id).then((r) => r.json());
language_snippets.jsx: const resource = await fetch('/api/items/' + useParams().id).then((r) => r.json());
language_snippets.tsx: const resource = await fetch('/api/items/' + useParams().id).then((r) => r.json());
language_snippets.vue: const resource = await axios.get('/api/items/' + useRoute().params.id).then((r) => r.data);
